title: triodia intermedia
intro: Triodia intermedia, also known as kangaroo grass, is a species of grass native to Australia and is a type of spinifex grass. The plant has been used in traditional Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triodia intermedia include its potential to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and wounds, thanks to its antibacterial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and then used in infusions, decoctions, or applied topically in the form of a salve or poultice.
